metadata.description: Project-agnostic agent-memory engine + read-only knowledge MCP for Claude Code.

plugins.name: ultra-memory
plugins.description: SQLite-canonical volatile memory with a single audited write gateway, OAuth-only LLM chokepoint, session checkpoint/rehydration hooks, and a type-scoped knowledge_query MCP tool. Code-only and content-free — data/config stay private in the consumer project.
